result.stdout:
Abp Dev Tools v2.2.0
  A set of tools to make development with ABP easier.

USAGE
  abpdev [options]
  abpdev [command] [...]

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

COMMANDS
  abp-studio switch  Switches to ABP Studio version 
  add-package       Adds a NuGet package to the project and configures module dependency. Works with any NuGet source configured in nuget.config. 
  build             Shortcut for dotnet build /graphBuild 
  bundle            Runs 'abp bundle' command for each Blazor WASM projects recursively. Subcommands: bundle list.
  clean             Cleans 'bin', 'obj' and 'node_modules' folders recursively. Subcommands: clean config.
  config            Subcommands: config clear.
  database-drop     Drops all databases in the working directory 
  disable-notifications  
  enable-notifications  
  env               Virtual Environment. You can create virtual envionments and run your applications on pre-built virtual environments without changing any files on your computer. Subcommands: env config.
  envapp            Environment apps that required while development. Subcommands: envapp config, envapp start, envapp stop.
  find-file         Finds the specified text in the solution. 
  find-port         Find and manage process using the specified port 
  local-sources     Allows managing local sources configuration. 
  logs              Subcommands: logs clear.
  migrate           Runs all .DbMigrator projects in folder recursively. 
  migrations        Manages EntityFrameworkCore migrations in multiple projects. Subcommands: migrations add, migrations clear, migrations recreate.
  prepare           Prepare the project for the first running on this machine. Creates database, redis, event bus containers. 
  references        Allows managing local sources configuration for switch references to local or remote sources. Subcommands: references config, references to-local, references to-package.
  replace           Runs file replacement according to configuration. Subcommands: replace config.
  run               Run all the required applications Subcommands: run config.
  switch-to-env     Switches to the specified environment. 
  test              runs 'dotnet test' command recursively. 
  tools             Subcommands: tools config.
  update            Checks for updates 

You can run `abpdev [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

commands.payload:
Abp Dev Tools v2.2.0
  A set of tools to make development with ABP easier.

USAGE
  abpdev [options]
  abpdev [command] [...]

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

COMMANDS
  abp-studio switch  Switches to ABP Studio version 
  add-package       Adds a NuGet package to the project and configures module dependency. Works with any NuGet source configured in nuget.config. 
  build             Shortcut for dotnet build /graphBuild 
  bundle            Runs 'abp bundle' command for each Blazor WASM projects recursively. Subcommands: bundle list.
  clean             Cleans 'bin', 'obj' and 'node_modules' folders recursively. Subcommands: clean config.
  config            Subcommands: config clear.
  database-drop     Drops all databases in the working directory 
  disable-notifications  
  enable-notifications  
  env               Virtual Environment. You can create virtual envionments and run your applications on pre-built virtual environments without changing any files on your computer. Subcommands: env config.
  envapp            Environment apps that required while development. Subcommands: envapp config, envapp start, envapp stop.
  find-file         Finds the specified text in the solution. 
  find-port         Find and manage process using the specified port 
  local-sources     Allows managing local sources configuration. 
  logs              Subcommands: logs clear.
  migrate           Runs all .DbMigrator projects in folder recursively. 
  migrations        Manages EntityFrameworkCore migrations in multiple projects. Subcommands: migrations add, migrations clear, migrations recreate.
  prepare           Prepare the project for the first running on this machine. Creates database, redis, event bus containers. 
  references        Allows managing local sources configuration for switch references to local or remote sources. Subcommands: references config, references to-local, references to-package.
  replace           Runs file replacement according to configuration. Subcommands: replace config.
  run               Run all the required applications Subcommands: run config.
  switch-to-env     Switches to the specified environment. 
  test              runs 'dotnet test' command recursively. 
  tools             Subcommands: tools config.
  update            Checks for updates 

You can run `abpdev [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
Abp Dev Tools v2.2.0
  A set of tools to make development with ABP easier.

USAGE
  abpdev abp-studio switch <version> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Switches to ABP Studio version

PARAMETERS
* version           Version of ABP Studio to install. Default: 0.7.6 

OPTIONS
  -c|--channel      Channel of ABP Studio to install. Default: beta Default: "stable".
  -f|--force        Force download and install the package Default: "False".
  -i|--install-dir  Path to the ABP Studio installation directory. Default: %localappdata%\abp-studio 
  -p|--packages-dir  Path to the ABP Studio packages directory. You can use different folder for caching packages. Using custom folder provides fast version switching.Default: %localappdata%\abp-studio\packages 
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

commands.payload:
Abp Dev Tools v2.2.0
  A set of tools to make development with ABP easier.

USAGE
  abpdev abp-studio switch <version> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Switches to ABP Studio version

PARAMETERS
* version           Version of ABP Studio to install. Default: 0.7.6 

OPTIONS
  -c|--channel      Channel of ABP Studio to install. Default: beta Default: "stable".
  -f|--force        Force download and install the package Default: "False".
  -i|--install-dir  Path to the ABP Studio installation directory. Default: %localappdata%\abp-studio 
  -p|--packages-dir  Path to the ABP Studio packages directory. You can use different folder for caching packages. Using custom folder provides fast version switching.Default: %localappdata%\abp-studio\packages 
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

result.stdout:
Abp Dev Tools v2.2.0
  A set of tools to make development with ABP easier.

USAGE
  abpdev add-package <packagename> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Adds a NuGet package to the project and configures module dependency. Works with any NuGet source configured in nuget.config.

PARAMETERS
* packagename       Name of the NuGet package to add. 

OPTIONS
  -p|--project      Path to the project file (.csproj). Default: searches current directory. 
  -v|--version      Version of the package to install. 
  -s|--skip-dependency  Skip adding module dependency (DependsOn attribute). Default: "False".
  --no-restore      Skip restoring the project after adding the package. Default: "False".
  -a|--all          Add package to all projects in the solution/folder. Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

commands.payload:
Abp Dev Tools v2.2.0
  A set of tools to make development with ABP easier.

USAGE
  abpdev add-package <packagename> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Adds a NuGet package to the project and configures module dependency. Works with any NuGet source configured in nuget.config.

PARAMETERS
* packagename       Name of the NuGet package to add. 

OPTIONS
  -p|--project      Path to the project file (.csproj). Default: searches current directory. 
  -v|--version      Version of the package to install. 
  -s|--skip-dependency  Skip adding module dependency (DependsOn attribute). Default: "False".
  --no-restore      Skip restoring the project after adding the package. Default: "False".
  -a|--all          Add package to all projects in the solution/folder. Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

Abp Dev Tools v2.2.0
  A set of tools to make development with ABP easier.

USAGE
  abpdev build <workingdirectory> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Shortcut for dotnet build /graphBuild

PARAMETERS
  workingdirectory  Working directory to run build. Probably project or solution directory path goes here. Default: . (Current Directory) 

OPTIONS
  -f|--build-files  (Array) Names or part of names of projects or solutions will be built. 
  -i|--interactive  Interactive build file selection. Default: "False".
  -c|--configuration  
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

Abp Dev Tools v2.2.0
  A set of tools to make development with ABP easier.

USAGE
  abpdev bundle <workingdirectory> [options]
  abpdev bundle [command] [...]

DESCRIPTION
  Runs 'abp bundle' command for each Blazor WASM projects recursively.

PARAMETERS
  workingdirectory  Working directory to run build. Probably project or solution directory path goes here. Default: . (Current Directory) 

OPTIONS
  -g|--graphBuild   Graph builds project before running 'abp bundle'. Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 

COMMANDS
  list              List projects that needs to run 'abp bundle'. 

You can run `abpdev bundle [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

  A set of tools to make development with ABP easier.

USAGE
  abpdev clean <workingdirectory> [options]
  abpdev clean [command] [...]

DESCRIPTION
  Cleans 'bin', 'obj' and 'node_modules' folders recursively.

PARAMETERS
  workingdirectory  Working directory to run build. Probably project or solution directory path goes here. Default: . (Current Directory) 

OPTIONS
  -s|--soft-delete  Move to recycle bin instead of permanent deletion. Default: "False".
  -i|--ignore-path  Skip path from cleaning. Default: .
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 

COMMANDS
  config            Subcommands: config clear.

You can run `abpdev clean [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

Abp Dev Tools v2.2.0
  A set of tools to make development with ABP easier.

USAGE
  abpdev database-drop <workingdirectory> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Drops all databases in the working directory

PARAMETERS
  workingdirectory  Working directory to search for EntityFramework projects. Default: . (Current Directory) 

OPTIONS
  -f|--force        Default: "False".
  -p|--package      Filter projects by direct package reference. Only projects with this package will have their databases dropped. 
  -e|--env          Uses the virtual environment for this process. Use 'abpdev env config' command to see/manage environments. 
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

USAGE
  abpdev envapp [options]
  abpdev envapp [command] [...]

DESCRIPTION
  Environment apps that required while development.

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 

COMMANDS
  config            Allows managing replacement configuration. Subcommands: config clear.
  start             Deploys infrastructural tools to docker. Such as Redis, RabbitMQ, SqlServer etc. 
  stop              Stops previously deployed environment app. 

You can run `abpdev envapp [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

USAGE
  abpdev envapp start <appnames...> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Deploys infrastructural tools to docker. Such as Redis, RabbitMQ, SqlServer etc.

PARAMETERS
  appnames          Name of the app. Default: .

OPTIONS
  -p|--password     Default password for sql images when applicable. Default: 12345678Aa Default: "12345678Aa".
  -v|--verbose      Show detailed output from Docker commands. Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

USAGE
  abpdev migrate <workingdirectory> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Runs all .DbMigrator projects in folder recursively.

PARAMETERS
  workingdirectory  Working directory to run build. Probably project or solution directory path goes here. Default: . (Current Directory) 

OPTIONS
  --no-build        Skipts build before running. Passes '--no-build' parameter to dotnet run. Default: "False".
  -e|--env          Uses the virtual environment for this process. Use 'abpdev env config' command to see/manage environments. 
  -a|--all          Projects to run will not be asked as prompt. All of them will run. Default: "False".
  -p|--projects     (Array) Names or part of names of projects will be ran. Default: .
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

USAGE
  abpdev migrations [options]
  abpdev migrations [command] [...]

DESCRIPTION
  Manages EntityFrameworkCore migrations in multiple projects.

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 

COMMANDS
  add               Adds migration with specified name in EntityFrameworkCore project(s). Used to add bulk migrations to multiple project at the same time. 
  clear             Clears 'Migrations' folders from EntityFrameworkCore projects. 
  recreate          Clears existing migrations and recreates an 'Initial' migration for selected EntityFrameworkCore project(s). Optionally drops databases afterwards. 

You can run `abpdev migrations [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

USAGE
  abpdev prepare <workingdirectory> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Prepare the project for the first running on this machine. Creates database, redis, event bus containers.

PARAMETERS
  workingdirectory  Working directory to run build. Probably project or solution directory path goes here. Default: . (Current Directory) 

OPTIONS
  --no-config       Do not create local configuration file. (abpdev.yml) Default: "False".
  --no-install-libs  Do not run 'abp install-libs'. Default: "False".
  --no-env-apps     Do not start environment apps (containers). Default: "False".
  --no-bundle       Skip bundling Blazor WASM projects. Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

USAGE
  abpdev replace <replacementconfigname> [options]
  abpdev replace [command] [...]

DESCRIPTION
  Runs file replacement according to configuration.

PARAMETERS
  replacementconfigname  If you execute single option from config, you can pass the name or pass 'all' to execute all of them 

OPTIONS
  -p|--path         Working directory of the command. Probably solution directory. Default: . (CurrentDirectory) 
  -i|--interactive  Interactive Mode. It'll ask prompt to pick one config. Default: "False".
  -f|--files        Specific file names to replace. If provided, only these files will be processed. Supports partial match. 
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 

COMMANDS
  config            Allows managing replacement configuration. Subcommands: config clear.

You can run `abpdev replace [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

USAGE
  abpdev run <workingdirectory> [options]
  abpdev run [command] [...]

DESCRIPTION
  Run all the required applications

PARAMETERS
  workingdirectory  Working directory to run build. Probably project or solution directory path goes here. Default: . (Current Directory) 

OPTIONS
  -w|--watch        Watch mode Default: "False".
  --skip-migrate    Skips migration and runs projects directly. Default: "False".
  -a|--all          Projects to run will not be asked as prompt. All of them will run. Default: "False".
  --no-build        Skips build before running. Passes '--no-build' parameter to dotnet run. Default: "False".
  -i|--install-libs  Runs 'abp install-libs' command while running the project simultaneously. Default: "False".
  --skip-check-libs  Skips library installation check before running. Default: "False".
  -g|--graphBuild   Uses /graphBuild while running the applications. So no need building before running. But it may cause some performance. Default: "False".
  -p|--projects     (Array) Names or part of names of projects will be ran. Default: .
  -c|--configuration  
  -e|--env          Uses the virtual environment for this process. Use 'abpdev env config' command to see/manage environments. 
  -r|--retry        Retries running again when application exits. Default: "False".
  -v|--verbose      Shows verbose output from the projects. Default: "False".
  --yml             Path to the yml file to be used for running the project. 
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 

COMMANDS
  config            Subcommands: config clear.

You can run `abpdev run [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.
